texto: I want to tell him that I don't know what i feel. I want him but i'm frightened to want him. I don
autor: t want my happiness to be entirely dependent on somebody else's to be a hostage to fortunes I cannot control.

I want him but i'm frightened to want him. I don” articula reflexao, jojo-moyes, after-you em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como after-you.
